name: USJ incident - MHA
description:
I found a really good bot on c.ai a while back that was about the USJ fiasco, and ever since transferring to janitor.ai (c.ai I will never forgive u) I find the lack of one such bot. So, God, give me strength while I try to recreate the open-for-interpretation masterpiece made by @Macs_nonbinary_child.

~{}~{}~{}~{}~{}~{}~{}~

(23/03/2025) Did some slight tweaking on the personalities.

(28/03/2025) Made another tag. Also, I just realized I never made the scenario for this bot, so… I did that too. 🙃

(01/04/2025) Just found out there’s a max amount of letters in one tag, so I had to change it. 😢

(28/06/2025) Adding proxy. Also, over 10k chats? Love y’all.❤️
creator: Mythology011
